alkylation reagent: treated with iodoacetamide to alkylate all Cys
alkylation concentration: alkylated in the dark with 5.5 mM iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: N-methylated trypsin was added to digest the protein mixture
fragmentation method: using a Top Speed acquisition time of 3-s
instrument: online by nanoelectrospray-ionization tandem mass spectrometry on an Orbitrap Fusion
ionization type: online by nanoelectrospray-ionization tandem mass spectrometry
